src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta EE compatible Hibernate5JakartaModule to support the namespace shift in Spring Boot 3.
Remove the ProblemModule bean and its import, likely because the dependency was removed or replaced by a different error handling mechanism in the newer framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule; and the problemModule() bean definition.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the ConstraintViolationProblemModule bean and its import, aligning with the removal of the associated Zalando problem library dependency.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule; and the constraintViolationProblemModule() bean definition.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot versions.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone @Configuration class returning a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support Spring Security 6 method security.
Refactor HttpSecurity configuration from imperative .and() chaining to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in the authorization configuration.
Update header configuration to use lambda DSL and replace deprecated featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy.
Update OAuth2 resource server configuration to use lambda DSL for JWT authentication converter.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
